name: com.mycore.iapkit
description: A reusable Unity In-App Purchasing module built on Unity Purchasing v5 + UniTask. Connect/FetchProducts/FetchPurchases flow, sequential purchase queue, kill-after-pay recovery, owned-order tracking, Google subscription upgrade (proration), Apple StoreKit2 JWS expiry, and auto-renew detection. Game-specific touch points are seams; zero game-specific dependencies.

samples.description: App-side wiring example: config/txn-store/listener seams + a drop-in MonoBehaviour host.
